project_name: Asian Financial Market Intelligent Prediction Platform

design_philosophy.name: E1 Mystic-Tech Financial
core_principles: Data Density over White Space (Market Mode)

typography.installation_instructions: Import these fonts via Google Fonts in index.html: Barlow Condensed (400,600,700), Cinzel (400,700), IBM Plex Sans (400,500,600), JetBrains Mono (400,700).

grid_system.market_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-1 p-1 bg-border
grid_system.divination_spread: flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-8 py-12

buttons.primary: bg-[#f0a500] hover:bg-[#ffc107] text-black font-bold px-4 py-2 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wide transition-colors
buttons.market_action: bg-[#2a2f3e] hover:bg-[#3f4556] text-white border border-[#3f4556] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono
buttons.divination_glow: bg-transparent border border-[#ffd700] text-[#ffd700] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,215,0,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(255,215,0,0.6)] px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-serif

cards.market_ticker: bg-[#141824] border border-[#2a2f3e] p-3 flex flex-col justify-between hover:border-[#f0a500] transition-colors
cards.prediction_panel: bg-[#0a0e17] border border-[#00f0ff]/30 relative overflow-hidden backdrop-blur-sm
cards.divination_card: bg-[#1a0b2e] border border-[#ffd700]/50 aspect-[2/3] relative perspective-1000 group cursor-pointer

general: Avoid 'AI slop' by using specific textures and avoiding generic gradients.
NO transparent backgrounds on surfaces with content underneath.
Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
market_specific: Use Red (#f5222d) ONLY for price increase.
Use Green (#00b300) ONLY for price decrease.
Density is key: reduce padding in data tables.
divination_specific: Use Serif fonts for all text in this module.
Animations should be slow and fade-in, not slide.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'lucide-react' and 'recharts' immediately. 2. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the fixed dark theme and navigation. 3. Use the image URLs provided for the specific sections. 4. Implement the 'Tonghuashun' style by keeping borders thin (1px) and dark (#2a2f3e), and avoiding large rounded corners in the market view. 5. For the Divination page, switch the background to a deep indigo gradient or star texture. 6. Since you are using JS, ensure prop-types are minimal or handled gracefully. 7. Do not ask for user login, start straight at the dashboard.
